{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:L/E:X/CR:X/IR:X/AR:X/MAV:X/MAC:X/MAT:X/MPR:X/MUI:X/MVC:X/MVI:X/MVA:X/MSC:X/MSI:X/MSA:X/S:X/AU:X/R:X/V:X/RE:X/U:X"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-hw9r-6m78-w6h3. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
GeoNode versions 4.0 before 4.4.5 and 5.0 before 5.0.2 contain a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the service registration endpoint that allows authenticated attackers to trigger outbound network requests to arbitrary URLs by submitting a crafted service URL during form validation. Attackers can probe internal network targets including loopback addresses, RFC1918 private IP ranges, link-local addresses, and cloud metadata services by exploiting insufficient URL validation in the WMS service handler without private IP filtering or allowlist enforcement.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v8f7-cg9p-w5jx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T12:50:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8f7-cg9p-w5jx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v8f7-cg9p-w5jx"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-10T20:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-04-10T21:31:15Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39922", "https://github.com/GeoNode/geonode/releases/tag/4.4.5", "https://github.com/GeoNode/geonode/releases/tag/5.0.2", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/geonode-ssrf-via-service-registration", "https://github.com/GeoNode/geonode/security/advisories/GHSA-hw9r-6m78-w6h3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8f7-cg9p-w5jx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: GeoNode contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the service registration endpoint", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T12:50:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8f7-cg9p-w5jx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.4.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "geonode"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.4.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "geonode"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0, < 5.0.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-08T12:50:43Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: GeoNode contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the service registration endpoint
